changeSet.author: aniruddh
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE applications MODIFY application_state ENUM('SAVED','SENT','ACCEPTED','IN_REVIEW','REJECTED','WITHDRAWN','JOB_CLOSED','JOB_CLOSED_DRAFT','INTERVIEW') NOT NULL;

changeSet.author: aniruddh
changeSet.comment: Reclassify never-submitted drafts whose job was closed: JOB_CLOSED rows with a NULL applied_at were SAVED before the close, so they belong to the new JOB_CLOSED_DRAFT state.
changeSet.sql: UPDATE applications SET application_state = 'JOB_CLOSED_DRAFT' WHERE application_state = 'JOB_CLOSED' AND applied_at IS NULL;
